reference: Hello, I just finished my fifth round of Clomiphene Citrate for infertility. My period started, or I thought it did - in one day it has stopped completely. I still have low back pain that is usually associated with my period. I took a pregnancy test this morning, and it was negative. My bleeding started on day twenty-eight - normal. What is going on?
text: Hello! I just finished my fifth round of clomiphene citrate for infertility. My period started, or I thought it did. In one day, it has stopped completely. I still have low back pain that is usually associated with my period. I took a pregnancy test this morning, and it was negative. My bleeding started on day 28. Normal? What is going on?
